Who we are

Built by crews who show up.

We started as a two-person crew with one truck and a rule we still keep: leave every property better than we found it, and stand behind the work long after the invoice clears.

Today our designers, masons, and grounds crews handle the whole job — from the first sketch to the last flagstone — so you deal with one team that owns the result.

1
Crew, start
to finish
5yr
Workmanship
warranty
0
Subbed-out
surprises
Drop a crew / project photo
What we do

From bare dirt to finished grounds.

01Landscape Design & BuildFull-property design, planting plans, and the crews to build every bit of it.
02Hardscaping & PatiosFlagstone, pavers, retaining walls, fire pits, and walkways built to hold.
03Lawn & Garden CareSeasonal maintenance, cleanups, mulching, and planting that keeps it sharp.
04Irrigation & DrainageEfficient sprinkler systems, drip lines, and grading that moves water right.
05Tree & Shrub WorkPruning, removals, and healthy plantings chosen for the Colorado climate.
Why Cedar & Stone

Reasons crews get rehired.

One crew, one owner

The same team designs and builds your project. No mystery subs, no finger-pointing when something needs fixing.

Backed in writing

Licensed, insured, and a five-year workmanship warranty on every build. We answer the phone after the job, too.

Built for this climate

Drought-smart planting and grading made for Front Range freeze-thaw — so it still looks right in year five.

Clean, on schedule

Clear timelines, tidy sites, and a crew that hauls off every scrap before they leave for the day.

How it works

Three steps to a finished yard.

01

Walk & Quote

We visit, listen to how you'll use the space, take measurements, and send a clear written estimate — no guesswork.

02

Design & Schedule

You approve a plan and a start date. We line up materials and crews so the job runs without stalls.

03

Build & Stand Behind

We build it, clean up daily, and walk the finished site with you — then back it with our warranty.

Questions

Before you call.

Do you charge for estimates?+
No — on-site quotes are free. We'll walk the property, talk through what you want, and send a clear written estimate with no obligation.
Are you licensed and insured?+
Yes. We carry a current contractor's license and full liability and workers' comp insurance. We're happy to provide proof of coverage before any work begins.
Do you handle both design and the build?+
We do the whole job in-house — design, hardscaping, planting, and irrigation. One crew owns the project start to finish, so nothing falls through the cracks between trades.
What about maintenance after the build?+
We offer seasonal maintenance plans to keep your investment looking sharp, and every build is backed by our five-year workmanship warranty.
Where we work

Serving Boulder County.

Based on Granite Rd, our crews cover Boulder and the surrounding Front Range towns.
